title: Frisky
writer: Ettore Maria Margadonna, Luigi Comencini, Eduardo De Filippo
actors: Vittorio De Sica, Gina Lollobrigida, Marisa Merlini
plot: The relationships between a veteran marshal, his bride-to-be, a rookie and his fiancée are severely tested when the young carabiniere is temporarily sent to a distant town.
